zh.lifeSummary: Alice Swithen於1580年1月15日出生在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里。她於大約1595年與William Carpenter在英國維爾爾索爾茲伯里 馮 克洛斯 本 馮 卡農斯 本 馮 凱德拉爾 邱奇結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1638年1月25日在英國維爾爾沙爾布恩享年58歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾沙爾布恩。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Alice Swithen于1580年1月15日出生在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里。她于大约1595年与William Carpenter在英国維爾爾索爾茲伯里 馮 克洛斯 本 馮 卡農斯 本 馮 凱德拉爾 邱奇结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1638年1月25日在英国維爾爾沙爾布恩享年58岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾沙爾布恩。

nameMeanings.name: Swithen
meanings: An old name formerly written Switheahn, which Camden derives from Anglo-Saxon swithe greatly, heagh high. It is the same with the Old and Middle High German name Suithin, and is rendered illustrious by St. Swithin, Bishop of Winchester, who died A. D. 862. It is found Latinised Swithinus, and is also represented by Celsus and Exuperius.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: Alice Swithen was born on 15 January 1580, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England. She married William Carpenter about 1595, in Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 25 January 1638, in Shalbourne, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Shalbourne, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Alice Swithen est née le 15 janvier 1580, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Elle a épousé William Carpenter environ 1595, à Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. de.lifeSummary: Alice Swithen wurde am 15. Januar 1580 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England geboren. Sie hat um 1595 in Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, England William Carpenter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 25. Januar 1638 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Shalbourne, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Shalbourne, Wiltshire, England begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Swithenは1580年1月15日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーで生まれた。約1595年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリー ス クロゼ オフ ス カノンス オフ ス カスエドラル チャーチでWilliam Carpenterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1638年1月25日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアシャルボウルンで58歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアシャルボウルンにて埋葬された。

ko.Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the: 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이 테 클로스 프 테 캔스 프 테 캐테드럴 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Swithen(은)는 1580년 1월 15일 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1595년 영국 윌츠히르 살리스버이 테 클로스 프 테 캔스 프 테 캐테드럴 c후르치에서 William Carpenter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1638년 1월 25일 영국 윌츠히르 샤보우른에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 샤보우른에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com William Carpenter aproximadamente 1595, em Salisbury the Close of the Canons of the Cathedral Church, Wiltshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 25 de janeiro de 1638, em Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultada em Shalbourne, Wiltshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Alice Swithen родилась 15 января 1580 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Carpenter около 1595 г. в местности салисбури т клос оф т канонс оф т кэтедраль чурч, уилцхир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 25 января 1638 г. в местности шэлбурн, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и была похоронена в местности шэлбурн, уилцхир, Англия.
